Make a list of the five. The five. You know who the five are? You know there's an old saying, if I take the five people that you spend most of your time with, I'll know everything there is to know about you. I literally wouldn't have to ask anything about you. I could just say, tell me those five friends, let me see their finances, let me see their credit, let me see how they live their life, let me see what they're doing on the weekends and I'll know about you. Alright, now I have not, to be honest with you, I have not fulfilled that five. I don't have that board, but what I do once or twice a week and when I'm smart I'll do it every day, is I write down in my 10x planner who are the five people I need to contact today, talk to today, meet today that would change my life. And just so you understand, I can write five people's names down. I want to meet these five people, I got five of them in my head right now, Cuban's one of them, okay? Now the reason I'm doing this, this isn't like some kind of law of attraction thing, this is the power of focus, it is the power of me focusing, who do I need to meet? See my attention goes into the future, maybe I'm gonna be on your list, I need to meet Grant, I want to spend time with Grant Cardone, who else do you need to meet? Because there's a good chance that me and you ain't gonna meet today. Who needs to be on that list, and by the way, tomorrow, who are you gonna put on that list?
